emiratesid.ae.readersmgt
Class CardInfo

java.lang.Object
  emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.CardInfo

public class CardInfo
extends java.lang.Object

Copyright (c) 2010 LOGICA. All Rights Reserved.
Contains all card configuration data

Since:
1.6
Version:
2.0
Author:
Hakim SEBSSI

Constructor Summary
CardInfo(PCSCReader reader)
          Initializes the CardInfo object with PCSC reader data
 
Method Summary
 char[] getCardSerialNumber()
          Retrieves Card Serial Number
 char[] getChipSerialNumber()
          Retrieves Chip Serial Number
 char[] getCPLC0101()
          Retrieves CPLC 0101 tag
 char[] getCPLC9F7F()
          Retrieves CPLC 9F7F tag
 char[] getIssuerReferenceNumber()
          Retrieves Issuer Reference Number
 char[] getIssuerSerialNumber()
          Retrieves Issuer Serial Number
 long getMaxFailedMatch()
          Retrieves Maximum Failed Match operations that can be done before the card blocks
 char[] getMOCAlgorithmVersion()
          Retrieves MatchOnCard (MOC) Algorithm Version
 char[] getMOCAppletState()
          Retrieves MatchOnCard (MOC) Applet Status
 char[] getMOCSerialNumber()
          Retrieves MatchOnCard (MOC) Serial Number

equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait
 

Constructor Detail

CardInfo

Initializes the CardInfo object with PCSC reader data

Parameters:
reader - initialized and connected PCSCReader object

                           throws MiddlewareException
Retrieves Card Serial Number

Returns:

MiddlewareException
